title: Library Science Teachers, Postsecondary
description: Teach courses in library science. Includes both teachers primarily engaged in teaching and those who do a combination of teaching and research.

tasks.text: Conduct research in a particular field of knowledge and present findings in professional journals, books, electronic media, or at professional conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate and grade students' class work, assignments, and papers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Keep abreast of developments in the field by reading current literature, talking with colleagues, giving presentations at conferences, and serving on committees in professional associations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and deliver lectures to undergraduate or graduate students on topics such as collection development, archival methods, and indexing and abstracting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare course materials, such as syllabi, homework assignments, and handouts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, evaluate, and revise curricula, course content, course materials, and methods of instruction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Initiate, facilitate, and moderate classroom discussions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile, administer, and grade examinations, or assign this work to others.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain student attendance records, grades, and other required records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Advise students on academic and vocational curricula and on career issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and obtain materials and supplies, such as textbooks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise undergraduate or graduate teaching, internship, and research work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and teach online courses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with colleagues to address teaching and research issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile bibliographies of specialized materials for outside reading assignments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Edit manuscripts for professional journals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve on academic or administrative committees that deal with institutional policies, departmental matters, and academic issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain regularly scheduled office hours to advise and assist students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write grant proposals to procure external research funding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as serving as department head.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in student recruitment, registration, and placement activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in campus and community events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Act as advisers to student organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and invite guest speakers to speak to classes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide professional consulting services to government or industry.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
